search_papers.description: Search papers by any combination of: author names, keywords (title/abstract), venue/journal, institution, paper IDs, or year. The system dynamically injects OR conditions for every entity found in the query.
search_papers.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
WITH DISTINCT p
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:ASSOCIATED_WITH]->(inst:Institution)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue,
       inst.name as institution
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

search_citations.description: Find papers that cite or are cited by a specific paper (citation network)
search_citations.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)-[:CITES]->(cited:Paper)
WHERE p.id IN $paper_ids OR cited.id IN $paper_ids
WITH collect(DISTINCT p) + collect(DISTINCT cited) AS all_papers
UNWIND all_papers AS paper
WITH DISTINCT paper
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(paper)
OPTIONAL MATCH (paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT paper.id as paper_id, paper.title as title, paper.abstract as abstract,
       paper.doi as doi, paper.publication_date as publication_date,
       paper.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, paper.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY paper.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

top_cited_papers.description: Find the most cited / most influential papers overall
top_cited_papers.cypher:
MATCH (p:Paper)
OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
RETURN DISTINCT p.id as paper_id, p.title as title, p.abstract as abstract,
       p.doi as doi, p.publication_date as publication_date,
       p.cited_by_count as cited_by_count, p.pdf_url as pdf_url,
       collect(DISTINCT a.name) as authors, v.name as venue
ORDER BY p.cited_by_count DESC
LIMIT $limit

coauthor_network.description: Find co-authors who published together with a specific author
coauthor_network.cypher:
MATCH (a1:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)<-[:AUTHORED]-(a2:Author)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a1.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
  AND a1 <> a2
RETURN DISTINCT a1.name as author, a2.name as coauthor,
       count(p) as shared_papers,
       collect(DISTINCT p.title)[..5] as sample_titles
ORDER BY shared_papers DESC
LIMIT $limit

author_venue_stats.description: Find which venues/journals an author publishes in most
author_venue_stats.cypher:
MATCH (a:Author)-[:AUTHORED]->(p:Paper)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(v:Venue)
WHERE any(name IN $author_names WHERE toLower(a.name) CONTAINS toLower(name))
RETURN DISTINCT a.name as author, v.name as venue, count(p) as paper_count,
       collect(DISTINCT p.title)[..3] as sample_titles
ORDER BY paper_count DESC
LIMIT $limit
